title: zinnia maritima var. palmeri
intro: Zinnia maritima var. palmeri, also known as Palmer's zinnia, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The medicinal properties of Palmer's zinnia provide health benefits such as wound healing, reduced inflammation, and antimicrobial activity, which can be beneficial in treating skin conditions, wounds, and infections. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
